data.name: LanguageCard.Description
data.value: We'll send notifications, emails and dashboard hints in this language whenever a translation is available.

data.name: PersonalInfo.LockedHeadline
data.value: Identity fields are locked for your security.

data.name: PersonalInfo.LockedBody
data.value: First name, last name, date of birth, business name and SSN can only be changed by our support team. Open a ticket from the Support page if any of these need to be corrected.

data.name: ProfileHeader.ImageTooLarge
data.value: Image is larger than 5 MB. Please choose a smaller file.

data.name: WebsiteSlug.Description
data.value: Choose the public address where prospects will land. Lowercase letters, digits and dashes only. Must start with a letter and be between 3 and 40 characters long.

data.name: WebsiteSlug.LocalError
data.value: Use 3–40 lowercase letters, digits or dashes. Must start with a letter.

data.name: WebsiteSlug.SlugTaken
data.value: That website name is already taken.

data.name: WebsiteSlug.SaveFailed
data.value: Could not update the website name.

data.name: DisplayPrefs.Description
data.value: Choose what visitors will see on your public website. Phone and email are hidden by default.

data.name: DisplayPrefs.ShowBusinessNameHelp
data.value: Visitors will see your registered business name instead of your personal name.

data.name: DisplayPrefs.ShowEmailHelp
data.value: Anyone landing on your replicate page can see this address.

data.name: DisplayPrefs.ShowPhoneHelp
data.value: Visitors will see your phone number; consider WhatsApp privacy.

data.name: PayoutFreq.Description
data.value: How often should we move accrued commissions into your default payout gateway? Daily payouts settle the next business day; weekly payouts settle every Friday.

data.name: BillingInfo.NoDefaultCard
data.value: No default card on file. Add a card to start auto-renewal.

data.name: AddCard.AlreadyExpired
data.value: This card is already expired. Please use a card with a future expiration date.

data.name: Credentials.PasswordFailed
data.value: Failed to update password. Please check your current password.

data.name: Credentials.EmailUpdated
data.value: Email updated successfully. A confirmation has been sent.

data.name: Credentials.EmailFailed
data.value: Failed to update email. Please check your password.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Description
data.value: Drag the cards to set the order in which the company should try to charge your membership. The first one that succeeds wins.

data.name: PaymentMethod.NoCardsTitle
data.value: You don't have any cards on file yet.

data.name: PaymentMethod.PayoutOptionsHint
data.value: Add or update each gateway separately. Mark one as default to receive commissions.

data.name: PaymentMethod.SetAsDefaultTooltip
data.value: Use this wallet to receive commission payouts

data.name: PaymentMethod.PendingApprovalTooltip
data.value: The gateway must approve this account before it can be set as default

data.name: PaymentMethod.WalletHistoryHint
data.value: — including account-identifier changes for fraud prevention

data.name: PaymentMethod.ApiLogHint
data.value: — request/response per gateway interaction (for support escalations)

data.name: PaymentMethod.EWalletPasswordHint
data.value: Required by I-Payout for the initial registration only.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Validation.CryptoRequired
data.value: A crypto wallet address is required, not an email. Provide a Bitcoin (bc1.../1.../3...), USDT-TRC20 (T...), or EVM (0x...) address.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Validation.CryptoInvalid
data.value: Account does not look like a valid crypto wallet address.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Validation.EmailRequired
data.value: This gateway expects a valid email address as the account identifier.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Gateway.EWalletHelp
data.value: I-Payout will email a confirmation to verify the account.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Gateway.DwollaHelp
data.value: Use the email tied to your Dwolla account.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Gateway.CryptoHelp
data.value: Provide the receiving wallet address for the asset you want payouts in.

data.name: PaymentMethod.Gateway.AdvCashHelp
data.value: Use the email tied to your AdvCash account.

data.name: TokenWidget.GrantModalMessage
data.value: Admin token grant modal — to be implemented.

data.name: CommissionEarnings.DeleteMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this unpaid commission? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: CommissionsDashboard.OnlyAmbassadors
data.value: Commissions are only available for Ambassadors.

data.name: Fsb.NoMembersWindow
data.value: No members enrolled in this window yet.

data.name: Boost.NoGoldEnrollments
data.value: No Gold enrollments for this period (threshold: 6).

data.name: Boost.NoPlatinumEnrollments
data.value: No Platinum enrollments for this period (threshold: 12).

data.name: Car.BranchModalNoMembers
data.value: No members found in this branch.

data.name: Reports.QualifyHeaderTooltip
data.value: Personal qualification points — sum of QualificationPoints from this member's own product purchases.

data.name: Reports.EnrollPointsTooltip
data.value: Enrollment-team points — points accumulated from this member's own downline (their sponsored members and below). 0 means they haven't enrolled anyone yet.

data.name: Reports.LeftPointsTooltip
data.value: Dual-tree left-leg points — accumulated points on this member's binary-tree LEFT leg. 0 means no descendants on that leg.

data.name: Reports.RightPointsTooltip
data.value: Dual-tree right-leg points — accumulated points on this member's binary-tree RIGHT leg. 0 means no descendants on that leg.

data.name: Team.RevertConfirmQuestion
data.value: Are you sure you want to revert the placement of

data.name: Team.RevertConfirmHelp
data.value: The ambassador and their subtree will be unlinked from the dual tree. They can be re-placed later and their subtree will follow them.

data.name: Team.HistoricalResidualsHint
data.value: Historical residuals data will display here

data.name: Placement.Subtitle
data.value: Manage the position of your recruited members in the Dual Team.

data.name: Placement.AdminSubtitle
data.value: Manage placements for all members of the network. No time or opportunity restrictions.

data.name: Placement.NoneMessage
data.value: All your recruits have a placement assigned. Well done!

data.name: Placement.AdminNoneMessage
data.value: There are no members pending placement in the network.

data.name: Placement.RemoveBodyPrefix
data.value: You are about to remove the placement of

data.name: Placement.RemoveOpportunityNote
data.value: This action will use a placement opportunity ({0} remaining).

data.name: Placement.RemoveLastWarningBody
data.value: This is your last placement opportunity. The next placement will be final.

data.name: Placement.AdminRemoveBodyPrefix
data.value: You are about to remove the placement of

data.name: Placement.AdminRemoveNote
data.value: Admin action: does not consume a placement opportunity.

data.name: Placement.SelectorLegend
data.value: Select node and leg in the Dual Team

data.name: Placement.NoPositionsMessage
data.value: There are no nodes with available slots in the sponsor's tree.

data.name: Placement.WindowInfo
data.value: You have {0} day(s) to complete the placement. Remaining opportunities: {1}.

data.name: Placement.Step1Help
data.value: Choose the node of your sponsor's Dual Team where you want to place the member.

data.name: Placement.NoNodesMessage
data.value: There are no available positions in the sponsor's team.

data.name: Placement.LastOpportunityBody
data.value: This will be the final placement. You will not be able to move it again.

data.name: Placement.SelectNodeBeforeContinue
data.value: Select a node and a leg before continuing.

data.name: Tokens.PurchaseNote
data.value: Note: Tokens may be used to pay for enrollments, Biz Center fees and Travel Advantage™. Once purchased, you may distribute tokens to your team. Token purchases are limited to 10 per month and are non-refundable.

data.name: Tokens.DistributionNote
data.value: Note: You may distribute tokens to your team and members. All token distributions are final.

data.name: Ranks.OnlyForAmbassadors
data.value: Ranks are only available for Ambassadors.

data.name: Ranks.AdminOverrideMessage
data.value: Manually set this member's rank outside normal qualification rules.

data.name: Ranks.OverrideModalMessage
data.value: You are about to manually override this member's rank. This action will be logged. Proceed?

data.name: Marketing.NoDocsMessage
data.value: There are no marketing documents available at this time.

data.name: Marketing.DownloadFailed
data.value: Could not generate download link. Please try again.

data.name: TicketDetail.NoComments
data.value: No comments yet. Be the first to reply.

data.name: TicketDetail.ResolveModalMessage
data.value: Mark this ticket as resolved? The member will be notified.

data.name: TicketCreate.DescriptionPlaceholder
data.value: Provide full details about your issue…

data.name: TicketCreate.AttachmentHelp
data.value: Supported: images, PDF, Word, TXT. Max 10 MB.

data.name: TicketCreate.ErrorGeneric
data.value: Failed to create ticket. Please try again.

data.name: Login.PleaseSignIn
data.value: Please Log In to Your Account

data.name: Login.ErrorInactive
data.value: Your account is inactive. Please contact support.

data.name: Login.ErrorSessionExpired
data.value: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

data.name: Signup.ProductsIntro
data.value: Select the products to include with your signup.

data.name: Signup.NoProducts
data.value: No additional products available. Click Continue to proceed.

data.name: Signup.AccountActive
data.value: Your account is active. Sign in now

data.name: Signup.AlreadyHaveAccount
data.value: Already have an account? Sign in

data.name: Signup.ErrorNameRequired
data.value: First and last name are required.

data.name: Signup.ErrorAge18
data.value: You must be at least 18 years old.

data.name: Signup.ErrorProductRequired
data.value: Please select at least one product.

data.name: Error.Subtitle
data.value: An error occurred while processing your request.

data.name: Error.DevModeIntro
data.value: Swapping to Development environment will display more detailed information about the error that occurred.

data.name: Error.DevModeWarning
data.value: The Development environment shouldn't be enabled for deployed applications. It can result in displaying sensitive information from exceptions to end users. For local debugging, enable the Development environment by setting the ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT environment variable to Development and restarting the app.

data.name: NotFound.Message
data.value: Sorry, that page does not exist.

data.name: ForgotPassword.Subtitle
data.value: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset it.

data.name: ForgotPassword.SuccessMessage
data.value: If an account exists for that email, you'll receive a reset link shortly.

data.name: ForgotPassword.ErrorEmailInvalid
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: ForgotPassword.ServerError
data.value: Could not reach the server. Please try again later.

data.name: ResetPassword.Subtitle
data.value: Choose a new password for your account.

data.name: ResetPassword.PasswordHint
data.value: Minimum 8 characters, at least one uppercase letter and one number.

data.name: ResetPassword.SuccessMessage
data.value: Your password has been reset. You can now sign in with your new password.

data.name: ResetPassword.InvalidLink
data.value: This reset link is invalid or has expired.

data.name: ResetPassword.ErrorWeak
data.value: Password must be at least 8 characters and include an uppercase letter and a number.

data.name: ResetPassword.ErrorGeneric
data.value: We couldn't reset your password. The link may be invalid or expired.

data.name: ResetPassword.ServerError
data.value: Could not reach the server. Please try again later.

data.name: TwoFactor.Subtitle
data.value: Enter the 6-digit code to finish signing in.

data.name: TwoFactor.ResentNotice
data.value: If the address is registered, a new code has been sent.

data.name: TwoFactor.ErrorNotImplemented
data.value: Two-factor verification is not available yet. Please continue from the login page.

data.name: TwoFactor.ServerError
data.value: Could not reach the server. Please try again later.
